measurement_note: Every tier places all original ones before all doubled twos. Sorting plus frequency consumption scales as O(N log N), while a correct list-search-and-removal implementation repeatedly scans across the remaining block of ones to locate a two and incurs quadratic work.

cases.name: benchmark: 256 values in separated original and double blocks
benchmark: 2048 values in separated original and double blocks
benchmark: 8192 values in separated original and double blocks
